text: Upgrade Gemini API tier and configure payment
description:
**HUMAN ACTION REQUIRED**

Image generation is currently blocked due to free tier quota exhaustion (0 remaining).

**Steps:**
1. Visit https://makersuite.google.com/app/apikey or Google Cloud Console
2. Upgrade to Gemini Pro paid tier
3. Expected cost: ~$0.04/image
4. Update API key in project configuration if needed

**Alternative:** Consider switching to DALL-E 3 or Stable Diffusion if Gemini pricing is not acceptable

**After setup:** Image generation in experience-mining will work, unblocking visual content creation for Instagram/Twitter.

status.comment: Waiting for human to upgrade Gemini API tier
